semantic.role: Pipeline stage task responsible for AST extraction, language detection, and symbol registration for source files identified during the scan phase.
responsibilities: Detects source files and resolves their programming language using the language registry and discovery.
Performs AST extraction for each source file and produces structural skeletons and symbol exports.
Registers extracted skeletons and exports into the task state and manifest layers.
Manages checkpoint progress for each file, including start, complete, and skip marks.
Handles unsupported or non-source files by recording them and optionally cleaning up stale state.
Uses forced-sync detection to re-extract files that require update.
outOfScope: File discovery and scanning (handled by the scan stage).
CLI command parsing or execution orchestration.
Direct database access (operates through the manifest facade).
invariants: Adheres to the task-stage-boundary rule by implementing only stage-local work without crossing into CLI parsing or unrelated orchestration.
Uses the SpineTask contract and does not bypass core abstractions.
Relies on ctx.manifest and ctx.extractor for all persistence and extraction, not performing direct I/O beyond reading file content.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: To isolate AST extraction as a dedicated pipeline stage, ensuring clean separation between scanning, extraction, and symbol registration.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Applied release gate fixes and synced accumulated source changes; no semantic alteration to the extraction task's contract.

publicSurface.description: Pipeline stage task that performs AST extraction, language detection, and symbol registration for source files. Consumed by the pipeline executor to process scanned file results.

English.role: Pipeline stage task for AST extraction, language detection, and symbol registration of scanned source files.
responsibilities: Identify source files and resolve their programming language via the language registry and language discovery modules.
Extract AST skeletons and symbol exports for each source file using the core extractor.
Register skeletons and exports into the task runtime state and the manifest layer.
Manage checkpoint lifecycle for each file, recording starts, completions, and skips.
Handle unsupported or non-source files by marking them and cleaning up any stale state.
Detect forced-sync files and re-extract them when necessary.
outOfScope: File scanning and discovery (part of the scan stage).
CLI command parsing or general orchestration.
Direct database manipulation (all persistence goes through the manifest facade).
